name: AI QBR Prep Agent
description: Auto-generate Quarterly Business Review briefs in 30 seconds: pulls usage, support, and call data, then GPT-4 writes the QBR talking points.
longDescription: Every Monday at 7 AM, scans your CRM for accounts with a QBR scheduled in the next 7 days. For each one, pulls the last 90 days of product usage (Mixpanel), last 5 support tickets (Zendesk), last 3 customer calls (Gong transcripts), and renewal opportunity context (Salesforce). GPT-4 synthesizes everything into a structured QBR brief: executive summary, top wins, top risks, expansion signals, and a recommended agenda. Output drops into a Google Doc the CSM owns. Saves 4-6 hours of manual prep per QBR.
